## Category
**Cluster:** API Security

---

## Product Brief
1. 42Crunch automates the enforcement of API security policies and standards across development and security ecosystems, helping security take back control of API Governance and giving development the tools to build safer APIs.
2. Their platform offers API Contract Security Audit (static analysis of OpenAPI definitions with over 300 checks), API Contract Conformance Scan (dynamic testing of API implementation), and API Protection (runtime micro firewall configured from the API contract).
3. It enables a collaborative DevSecOps approach to API security, shifting security left and enforcing it at runtime, providing continuous real-time threat protection without manual tuning, and integrating with developer tooling like IDEs and CI/CD pipelines.
